events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: confined space work in progress, permit expired mid-shift. OSHA 1910.146 requires a valid entry permit. If permit expired, work must stop, space evacuated, permit re-evaluated/reissued before re-entry. This is a sequence violation - permit must be valid throughout entry. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions: non-compliant. Actions: suspend entry, evacuate, reissue permit, retest atmosphere, verify conditions.
